input: Run web components on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected web components output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the web components workflow

input: Apply web components to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive web components analysis with evidence-tagged findings
